name: Brooklyn's Looming Heights
description:
New York has never been the safest place, let's be honest.

It's New York, after all! But there are plenty of cool sights, especially all the gargoyle statues.

It is weird that one is insanely large and muscular for some reason. But hey, everyone has their own quirks and kinks.

Been working through some character backlog. I have a LOT of bot ideas, and I really should be going through on some of the older ones rather than making a stream of newer ones. In any case, enjoy the bot of the Hyper Buff Brooklyn!

Art it is by Silver-Stag! Be sure to support the original artist!
creator: Nobody207
